prompt: Build a 5-slide IBM Carbon PPTX proposing HashiCorp Professional Services for AI-driven Terraform infrastructure. Title slide with HC CY26 Kit background, a section divider, and 3 content slides: AI capabilities (3-column pillars with 4 bullets each), implementation approach (3-phase timeline with 4 bullets each), and expected outcomes (4 stacked cards with descriptions plus 4 metric callouts). Make sure every slide passes visual QA with no text overflow or overlapping elements.

assertions.text: Agent performed visual QA by converting PPTX to images and inspecting them
No text is clipped or cut off at card/box boundaries in any slide
No elements overlap (callout bars don't collide with content above)
Agent completed at least one fix-and-verify cycle (fixed issues then re-checked)
